listings.title: Cummins Onan HomeSite™ 6500 Portable Generator W/ Cover Like New
listings.body: Never used. Just started up periodically to keep it fresh. Garaged with the cover on it. Starts right up and runs like a champ! This Cummins generator should run the whole house with no problem. Also a perfect worksite or camping generator. This rugged 5 kW portable gasoline generator delivers reliable power anywhere for emergency or residential standby power, maintenance crews and light commercial applications. Comes with cover and maintenance kit. • 5500 surge watts; 5000 rated watts • Cummins 13 HP 4-stroke OHV engine with electric start • Large 6.5-gallon fuel tank for up to 9 hours of continuous run time at rated load • 389cc engine features electric start with manual backup, integral battery tray (battery not included) and automatic low oil shutdown • Versatile 120V GFCI-protected duplex, • 120V locking plug and grounded • 120/240V receptacles • Integral battery tray • Circuit breaker protection • Full perimeter frame protection • 120V AC rated Amp: 41.6; rated maximum: 45.8 Amps • 240V AC rated Amp: 20.8; rated maximum: 22.9 Amps • 12V DC voltage with 8.3 DC amperage • Weight - 185 lbs. • Dimensions - 27" x 21" x 22" Owners Manual Here: https://assets.northerntool.com//products/168/documents/manuals/168303.pdf Cash Only. No Apps. No Trades. Serious Only. Thanks for Looking!

Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping and local delivery available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff 🥁

listings.title: Ultimate Support A-Frame Three Tier Keyboard Stand
listings.body: MADE IN USA Up for sale is my Ultimate A-Frame Keyboard and studio gear stand. Anyone that has used one of these knows that there isn’t another stand that will allow you to place as much gear in your studio in such a small space. You also know that they haven’t manufactured these for many many years and they are HARD TO FIND. Front to back depth: 26.5 in. Side to side width: 60.5 in. Height: 60 in. Cash Only. No Apps. listings.title: Framed Goldtone Disney Winnie the Pooh Painting called Mmmmmm II
listings.body: DISNEY Painting WINNIE THE POOH Artist David Willardson LIMITED Framed Picture COA Mmmmmm This is for a Disney Winnie the Pooh Painting called Mmmmmm II. This is signed by the painter David Willardson and is a limited edition framed piece Comes with an Appraisal and a COA. It is a Serigraph in color on wove paper. Signed in ink lower right. From the international proof edition of 195 Its appraised value is $1,450. The size of the frame is approximately 31 X 27.5" The size of painting in the frame is 16.5 X 13"
